column1: # 观云镜每日运势数据表

column6: FortuneTextZh
column7: FortuneTextEn

column6: 今日宜：种植，新芽将茁壮成长。
column7: Today is good for: Planting. New sprouts will thrive.

column6: 今日宜：浇水，茶树需要滋润。
column7: Today is good for: Watering. Tea trees need care.

column6: 今日宜：送礼，与人结善缘。
column7: Today is good for: Gifting. Build good relationships.

column6: 今日宜：探索，灵界等待你。
column7: Today is good for: Exploration. The spirit realm awaits.

column6: 大潮将至！今日所有灵物效果翻倍！
column7: The great tide approaches! All spirit effects are doubled!

column6: 春茶初芽，今日采茶品质上佳。
column7: Spring tea is sprouting. Great quality today.

column6: 夏日炎炎，记得多喝水解暑。
column7: Hot summer day. Remember to stay hydrated.

column6: 秋高气爽，适合在后山漫步。
column7: Clear autumn sky. Perfect for walking in the hills.

column6: 冬日静养，炉火旁品茶最佳。
column7: Winter rest. Best time for tea by the fire.

column6: 雨润万物，今日适合整理茶园。
column7: Rain nurtures all. Good day to tend the garden.

column6: 薄雾缭绕，灵茶将吸收更多灵气。
column7: Misty morning. Spirit tea will absorb more energy.

column6: 浓云压顶，茶叶将更加醇厚。
column7: Thick clouds overhead. Tea leaves will be richer.

column6: 大潮日！所有种植收益+50%！
column7: Great Tide Day! All farming yields +50%!

column6: 有人记挂你，今天去见见朋友吧。
column7: Someone is thinking of you. Go visit a friend today.

column6: 云海眷顾，今日诸事顺遂。
column7: The cloud sea favors you. Everything goes well today.

column6: 心中有光，今日可尝试制作高品质茶。
column7: Your heart shines. Try making high-quality tea today.

column6: 缘分将至，留意身边的邂逅。
column7: Fate approaches. Watch for encounters.

column6: 心意相通，某人正在思念你。
column7: Hearts align. Someone is thinking of you.

column6: 春回大地，万物复苏，正是播种时。
column7: Spring returns. All things revive. Time to plant.

column6: 蝉鸣阵阵，作物生长迅猛。
column7: Cicadas sing. Crops grow rapidly.

column6: 金风送爽，收获的季节来临。
column7: Golden winds blow. Harvest season arrives.

column6: 瑞雪兆丰年，冬眠也是修行。
column7: Snow promises abundance. Rest is also cultivation.

column6: 宜静心品茶，不宜急躁行事。
column7: Calm and enjoy your tea. Avoid rushing.

column6: 今日适合修缮建筑，整顿庄园。
column7: Good day for building and organizing your manor.

column6: 远方有客来访，注意门前动静。
column7: A visitor approaches. Watch the entrance.

column6: 云海波涛，预示着变化将至。
column7: The cloud sea waves

column6: 星辰闪烁，幸运女神眷顾。
column7: Stars twinkle

column6: 宜学习新技能，提升自我。
column7: Good day for learning new skills.
